title: Parsons Valley Forest Fire Rages Since April 15: Thousands of Hectares Burnt
summary: Devastating forest fire in Parsons Valley continues to burn since April 15, consuming thousands of hectares across the mountain region.

title: IAF Helicopters Grounded: High Winds Halt Aerial Firefighting
summary: Strong wind conditions have forced Indian Air Force helicopters to suspend aerial firefighting operations in the Nilgiris fire zone.

title: Over 400 Personnel Deployed from Five Districts to Fight Fire
summary: Multi-district firefighting task force with 400+ personnel mobilized to combat the Parsons Valley blaze using ground operations.

title: Elephant Attack Claims Youth in Gudalur's O-Valley Area
summary: A young man was fatally attacked by a wild elephant in the O-Valley area of Gudalur in a tragic human-wildlife conflict incident.

title: Six Forest Staff Injured During Violent Elephant Attack Protest
summary: Six temporary forest workers sustained injuries when protests over the elephant-related death turned violent in Gudalur.

title: Nilgiri Tahr Survey Completed: Third Synchronized Count Wrapped Up
summary: Third synchronized census of Nilgiri Tahr mountain ungulates concluded using the innovative 'Varudai' mobile app for population analysis.

title: New 'Varudai' Mobile App Revolutionizes Tahr Population Tracking
summary: Wildlife researchers deployed cutting-edge 'Varudai' mobile application to digitally track and analyze Nilgiri Tahr population data.

title: Madras High Court Maintains Pykara Boating Ban Pending Water Tests
summary: Madras High Court refused to lift boating restrictions on Pykara Lake, pending completion of soil and water quality test reports.

title: Forest Department Closes Tourist Attractions Due to Fire and Heat
summary: Forest Department shut down popular tourist destinations in Nilgiris as precaution during forest fire and peak summer season.

title: Thunderstorm Warning: Heavy Rain and Gusty Winds from April 30 to May 2
summary: IMD warns of moderate to heavy rainfall with gusty winds expected in Nilgiris from April 30 through May 2.
